content.text:
<user_query>
@04-营销传播/NT-AO/文案安排-领英/LinkedIn视频传播规划（拆条定位+配文方向+发布节奏）.md 你是不是没有跟着视频创意说明区规划领英的传播@04-营销传播/NT-AO/Open-Ear NR 视频创意说明.md ，视频已经是确定产出了
</user_query>

The user is pointing out a misalignment—the LinkedIn propagation plan needs to follow the video creative specification since the video is already locked in as a confirmed deliverable. I should review both documents to see how they connect.

Looking at the video creative spec, I can see the structure maps out the pain point presentation followed by the technical solution breakdown—noise capture, acoustic architecture, and filtering algorithms—but the user's pointing out that the actual video content doesn't align with this framework.

The spec explicitly calls for 4 independent short-form videos: three scenario comparisons, the 1000-ear 3D scanning experiment, the filtering algorithm, and the precision drilling footage. But the current LinkedIn strategy includes a "global noise collection" cut that isn't actually defined as a standalone video segment—it only appears in the main video, not as a dedicated short. So拆条 2 needs to be reconsidered or replaced with something that actually exists in the video assets. 现在我需要把视频创意里的具体文案和技术点映射到每条拆条上，确保配文方向和金句都有明确的出处。我在整理一个对应表，把四支拆条、母片和收束帖与视频创意的具体段落关联起来，这样每条内容都能直接引用视频里已经确定的表达。

同时要调整金句，因为原来规划的"全球噪音采集"
